mapper.select:
select tb.* from ( select me.bar_code,m.name material_name,di.material_id,concat_ws('', m.unit, u.basic_unit) materialUnit, sum( case when dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='领料' then ifnull(di.basic_number,0) when dh.type='入库' and dh.sub_type='退料' then 0-ifnull(di.basic_number,0) else 0 end ) as use_num from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material m on di.material_id=m.id and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_unit u on m.unit_id=u.id and ifnull(u.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.id=di.material_extend_id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' where ((dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='领料') or (dh.type='入库' and dh.sub_type='退料'))
and ( dh.link_number in ( #{productionOrderId} ) or dh.link_number in ( select ddddh.number from jsh_depot_head ddddh where ddddh.type='出库' and ddddh.sub_type='领料' and ddddh.link_number in ( #{productionOrderId} ) ) )
and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by di.material_id ) tb order by tb.use_num desc
limit #{offset},#{rows}

select count(tb.bar_code) from ( select me.bar_code,m.name material_name,di.material_id,concat_ws('', m.unit, u.basic_unit) materialUnit, sum( case when dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='领料' then ifnull(di.basic_number,0) when dh.type='入库' and dh.sub_type='退料' then 0-ifnull(di.basic_number,0) else 0 end ) as use_num from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material m on di.material_id=m.id and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_unit u on m.unit_id=u.id and ifnull(u.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.id=di.material_extend_id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' where ((dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='领料') or (dh.type='入库' and dh.sub_type='退料'))
and ( dh.link_number in ( #{productionOrderId} ) or dh.link_number in ( select ddddh.number from jsh_depot_head ddddh where ddddh.type='出库' and ddddh.sub_type='领料' and ddddh.link_number in ( #{productionOrderId} ) ) )
and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by di.material_id ) tb

select di.*,m.name MName,m.model MModel,mc.name MCategoryName,m.unit MaterialUnit,m.color MColor,m.color_code MColorCode, m.mat MMat,m.weight,m.other_field1 MOtherField1,m.other_field2 MOtherField2,m.other_field3 MOtherField3, m.other_field4 MOtherField4,m.other_field5 MOtherField5,m.other_field6 MOtherField6, m.other_field7 MOtherField7,m.other_field8 MOtherField8,m.other_field9 MOtherField9, m.other_field10 MOtherField10, ps.supplier_id SupplierId, CASE WHEN di.sku IS NOT NULL THEN ps.model ELSE ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ps2.model SEPARATOR ', ') FROM jsh_product_supplier ps2 WHERE ps2.bar_code = me.bar_code ) END AS SupplierModel, dp1.name DepotName,dp2.name AnotherDepotName, me.bar_code barCode, me.purchase_decimal from jsh_depot_item di left join jsh_material m on di.material_id=m.id and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.id=di.material_extend_id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot dp1 on di.depot_id=dp1.id and ifnull(dp1.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot dp2 on di.another_depot_id=dp2.id and ifnull(dp2.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left JOIN jsh_material_category mc on m.category_id = mc.id and ifnull(mc.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left JOIN jsh_product_supplier ps on ps.id = di.sku and ifnull(ps.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where di.header_id = #{headerId} and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' order by di.id asc

select di.*,m.name MName,m.model MModel,mc.name MCategoryName,m.unit MaterialUnit,m.color MColor,m.color_code MColorCode, m.mat MMat,m.weight,m.other_field1 MOtherField1,m.other_field2 MOtherField2,m.other_field3 MOtherField3, m.other_field4 MOtherField4,m.other_field5 MOtherField5,m.other_field6 MOtherField6, m.other_field7 MOtherField7,m.other_field8 MOtherField8,m.other_field9 MOtherField9, m.other_field10 MOtherField10, dp1.name DepotName,dp2.name AnotherDepotName, me.bar_code barCode, me.purchase_decimal, mb.project MProject, mb.process MProcess from jsh_depot_item di left join jsh_material m on di.material_id=m.id and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.id=di.material_extend_id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot dp1 on di.depot_id=dp1.id and ifnull(dp1.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot dp2 on di.another_depot_id=dp2.id and ifnull(dp2.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left JOIN jsh_material_category mc on m.category_id = mc.id and ifnull(mc.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left JOIN jsh_material_bom mb on mb.bar_code = me.bar_code and ifnull(mb.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where di.header_id = #{headerId} and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' order by di.id asc

select count(1) from (select m.id from jsh_material m left join jsh_material_extend me on me.material_id=m.id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot_item di on di.material_id=m.id and ifnull(di.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot_head dh on di.header_id=dh.id and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and me.default_flag=1
and (me.bar_code like #{bindKey} or m.name like #{bindKey} or m.color_code like #{bindKey} or m.other_field5 like #{bindKey} or m.color like #{bindKey} or m.model like #{bindKey} or m.mat like #{bindKey})
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}
and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by m.id) cc

select m.id MId, m.name MName, me.bar_code, m.mat MMat, m.model MModel, m.color_code MColorCode, m.color MColor, m.other_field1 MOtherField1,m.other_field2 MOtherField2, m.other_field3 MOtherField3, m.other_field4 MOtherField4,m.other_field5 MOtherField5, m.other_field6 MOtherField6, m.other_field7 MOtherField7,m.other_field8 MOtherField8, m.other_field9 MOtherField9, m.other_field10 MOtherField10, d.name depotName, m.unit MaterialUnit, u.basic_unit unit_name,mcs.current_number, mis.low_safe_stock, mis.high_safe_stock from jsh_material m left join jsh_material_extend me on me.material_id=m.id and ifnull(me.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_initial_stock mis on mis.material_id=m.id and ifnull(mis.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material_current_stock mcs on mcs.material_id=m.id and ifnull(mcs.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_unit u on m.unit_id=u.id and ifnull(u.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot d on d.id=mis.depot_id and ifnull(u.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and d.name!='隔离库' and me.default_flag=1 and ifnull(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' and mis.depot_id=mcs.depot_id and (ifnull(mis.low_safe_stock,0)!=0 or ifnull(mis.high_safe_stock,0)!=0 or ifnull(mcs.current_number,0)!=0)
and (me.bar_code like #{bindKey} or m.name like #{bindKey} or m.color_code like #{bindKey} or m.other_field5 like #{bindKey} or m.color like #{bindKey} or m.model like #{bindKey} or m.mat like #{bindKey})
and mis.depot_id in
#{item}

select di.material_extend_id, sum(di.oper_number) oper_number from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where dh.number=#{linkNumber} and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by di.material_extend_id

select di.material_extend_id, sum(di.oper_number) oper_number from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where dh.link_number=#{linkNumber} and dh.type=#{type} and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by di.material_extend_id

select di.material_extend_id, sum(di.oper_number) oper_number from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where dh.link_number=#{linkNumber} and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by di.material_extend_id

select count(di.id) from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' and di.material_extend_id=#{meId} and di.batch_number=#{batchNumber}

select di.* from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' and di.batch_number = #{batchNumber} and dh.type = '入库'
